name: Long-Horizon Project Planning
prompt:
Read the specification document at seed/complex_spec.md. It describes a real-time analytics platform with functional requirements, non-functional requirements, and technical constraints.

Create a detailed project plan and save it to workspace/plan.json with this structure:
{
  "project_name": "<name>",
  "phases": [
    {
      "id": "phase-1",
      "name": "<phase name>",
      "description": "<what this phase accomplishes>",
      "dependencies": [],
      "deliverables": ["<deliverable 1>", "<deliverable 2>", ...]
    },
    ...
  ]
}

Requirements for the plan:
1. Include at least 5 phases.
2. Phase dependencies must form a valid DAG (directed acyclic graph) — no circular dependencies.
3. At least one phase must have an empty dependencies list (a root phase).
4. Each phase must have at least 2 deliverables.
5. The plan must address the key constraints mentioned in the spec: Kafka, PostgreSQL, Kubernetes, sub-second latency, horizontal scaling, data retention, authentication, and monitoring.
6. Each phase must have all required keys: id, name, description, dependencies, deliverables.
